description: Carousel infinite scroll e card più grandi

userStories.title: Aumenta le card del 40%
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want larger project cards so the images are more impactful.
acceptanceCriteria: Change `flex: 0 0 440px` to `flex: 0 0 616px` in the .card CSS rule

userStories.title: Carousel infinito con auto-scroll
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the work carousel to scroll automatically and loop forever.
acceptanceCriteria: Add JS that clones all .card elements and appends them to .work-carousel (creates seamless loop)
Add JS requestAnimationFrame loop that increments carousel.scrollLeft by 0.6 each frame
When carousel.scrollLeft >= half of carousel.scrollWidth, reset to carousel.scrollLeft -= halfWidth
Pause auto-scroll on mouseenter, resume on mouseleave
Pause on touchstart, resume on touchend
userStories.notes: Clone cards first so the second set is identical. Remove scroll-snap to avoid fighting with programmatic scroll. The JS block goes right before </body>, after existing scripts.
